assertions.assertion: Calls AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement and AddClient with DPoPJsonWebKey set on the client options
Shows JWK generation using RsaSecurityKey with RSA.Create(2048) and JsonWebKeyConverter.ConvertFromSecurityKey, with Alg set to PS256
assertions.rationale: Code shows new RsaSecurityKey(RSA.Create(2048)), JsonWebKeyConverter.ConvertFromSecurityKey(rsaKey), and jsonWebKey.Alg = 'PS256'.

assertions.assertion: Warns that the DPoPJsonWebKey is a critical secret — losing it makes bound tokens unusable, leaking it nullifies DPoP security
assertions.rationale: The response does not include any warning about the DPoPJsonWebKey being a critical secret. It shows the code but doesn't mention the security implications of losing or leaking the key.
